title: Automation emails with Outlook
excerpt:

posts.author: MarcusTito (Marcus Santos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

I just started to create some automations using my company outlook, and I noticed that theres no option to send an email to people outside Monday.com. Im trying to create a system where every time someone joins the company my finance team would receive a notification, but since they are not part of the Monday.com, they can`t receive

Would be nice to have!!!

posts.author: jsimonson (Jen Simonson)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! My use-case is that I want to send an email to my ticketing system to auto-generate a ticket. But since it’s not a PERSON, I can’t send the email.

posts.author: SubmarineMike (Michael Hardy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not only nice to have, but why isn’t this an option? Seems like it should be very easy to do, and lots of use case scenarios would demand it.

There are some vendors that I do not want in my Monday account.
